ddls:
CREATE TABLE "employees" (
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employee */,
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the unit the employee belongs to */,
  "org_code" INTEGER /* Organization code */,
  "job_class_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the job class of the employee */,
  "snap_ed_fte" REAL /* Snap-ED FTE value */,
  "number" INTEGER /* Employee number */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the employee */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the employee */,
  "county" TEXT /* County where the employee is located */,
  "regional_educator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the regional educator assigned to the employee */,
  "county_director_id" INTEGER /* ID of the county director assigned to the employee */,
  "hire_date" TEXT /* Date when the employee was hired */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the employee */,
  "employment_status" TEXT /* Employment status of the employee (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "full_time_equivalent" REAL /* Full-time equivalent status of the employee */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_job_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("job_class_id") REFERENCES job_classes ("job_class_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_unit_id FOREIGN KEY ("unit_id") REFERENCES units ("unit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_regional_educator_id FOREIGN KEY ("regional_educator_id") REFERENCES regional_educators ("regional_educator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_county_director_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_director_id") REFERENCES county_directors ("county_director_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "units" (
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each unit */,
  "unit_name" TEXT /* Name of the unit */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the unit */,
  "parent_unit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent unit */,
  "unit_type" TEXT /* Type of unit (e.g., department, team) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "job_classes" (
  "job_class_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each job class */,
  "job_class_name" TEXT /* Name of the job class */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the job class */,
  "job_class_code" TEXT /* Code for the job class */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("job_class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regional_educators" (
  "regional_educator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each regional educator */,
  "regional_educator_name" TEXT /* Full name of the regional educator */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the regional educator */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region assigned to the regional educator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("regional_educator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "county_directors" (
  "county_director_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each county director */,
  "county_director_name" TEXT /* Full name of the county director */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the county director */,
  "county" TEXT /* County assigned to the county director */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("county_director_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "counties" (
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each county */,
  "county_name" TEXT /* Name of the county */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the county is located */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "snap_ed_ftes" (
  "snap_ed_fte_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each Snap-ED FTE value */,
  "snap_ed_fte_value" REAL /* Snap-ED FTE value */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the Snap-ED FTE value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("snap_ed_fte_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employee_job_class_history" (
  "employee_job_class_history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employee job class history entry */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee */,
  "job_class_id" INTEGER /* ID of the job class */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the job class assignment */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the job class assignment */,
  "reason_for_change" TEXT /* Reason for the job class change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_job_class_history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employee_job_class_history_job_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("job_class_id") REFERENCES job_classes ("job_class_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employee_job_class_history_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employee_unit_history" (
  "employee_unit_history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employee unit history entry */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee */,
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the unit */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the unit assignment */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the unit assignment */,
  "reason_for_change" TEXT /* Reason for the unit change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_unit_history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employee_unit_history_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employee_unit_history_unit_id FOREIGN KEY ("unit_id") REFERENCES units ("unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employee_county_history" (
  "employee_county_history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employee county history entry */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* ID of the county */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the county assignment */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the county assignment */,
  "reason_for_change" TEXT /* Reason for the county change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_county_history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employee_county_history_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employee_county_history_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employee_regional_educator_history" (
  "employee_regional_educator_history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employee regional educator history entry */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee */,
  "regional_educator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the regional educator */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the regional educator assignment */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the regional educator assignment */,
  "reason_for_change" TEXT /* Reason for the regional educator change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_regional_educator_history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employee_regional_educator_history_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employee_regional_educator_history_regional_educator_id FOREIGN KEY ("regional_educator_id") REFERENCES regional_educators ("regional_educator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employee_county_director_history" (
  "employee_county_director_history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employee county director history entry */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee */,
  "county_director_id" INTEGER /* ID of the county director */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the county director assignment */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the county director assignment */,
  "reason_for_change" TEXT /* Reason for the county director change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_county_director_history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employee_county_director_history_county_director_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_director_id") REFERENCES county_directors ("county_director_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employee_county_director_history_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., HR, manager, administrator) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the system was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, logout) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employee_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., job class, unit, county) */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Report data in JSON format */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employee_reports_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "unit_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the unit */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., employee count, job class distribution) */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Report data in JSON format */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_unit_reports_unit_id FOREIGN KEY ("unit_id") REFERENCES units ("unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "county_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* ID of the county */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., employee count, job class distribution) */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Report data in JSON format */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_county_reports_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee */,
  "field_changed" TEXT /* Field that was changed */,
  "previous_value" TEXT /* Previous value of the field */,
  "new_value" TEXT /* New value of the field */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the change was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_changed_by FOREIGN KEY ("changed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "permission_type" TEXT /* Type of permission (e.g., read, write, delete) */,
  "permission_level" TEXT /* Level of permission (e.g., unit, county, system) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employee_documents" (
  "document_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee */,
  "document_type" TEXT /* Type of document (e.g., resume, ID, contract) */,
  "document_data" TEXT /* Document data in binary format */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("document_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employee_documents_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)
